name: la-vie-en-rose-34-pos

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:local: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron:unsigned
scripts.clean:dist: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*\dist\win-unpacked\*' -or $_.Path -like '*\dist-local\win-unpacked\*' } | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @('electron','La Vie En Rose 34') } | Stop-Process -Force; Remove-Item -Path 'dist','dist-local' -Recurse -Force; exit 0"
scripts.build:electron: npm run clean:dist && npm run gen:icons && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:electron:unsigned: npm run clean:dist && npm run gen:icons && set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& set CSC_LINK=&& set CSC_KEY_PASSWORD=&& set WIN_CSC_LINK=&& set WIN_CSC_KEY_PASSWORD=&& electron-builder --win --dir -c.directories.output=dist-local -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false --publish never
scripts.release:publish: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.preview:final: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run electron:dist

description: La Vie En Rose 34 - Retail Management System
